html:
2026-0645
2026-06-22FIN, GACCustoms TariffOrder Amending the Steel Derivative Goods Surtax OrderOrder Amending the Steel Derivative Goods Surtax Order in order to (1) extend the exemption provided for steel derivative goods used in the manufacturing of motor vehicles, aerospace goods, and their parts to June 30, 2027; and (2) exempt goods originating in Canada from the surtax.Registration: SOR/2026-0155 Publication Date: 2026-07-01
subject: Order Amending the Steel Derivative Goods Surtax Order
precis: Order Amending the Steel Derivative Goods Surtax Order in order to (1) extend the exemption provided for steel derivative goods used in the manufacturing of motor vehicles, aerospace goods, and their parts to June 30, 2027; and (2) exempt goods originating in Canada from the surtax.
